title: Commercial Space
shortSummary: The business of space — launch economics, satellite services, space tourism, regulatory frameworks, and how the commercial space industry generates revenue.
whyItMatters: The space industry is worth over $400 billion and growing rapidly. SpaceX proved that commercial companies can out-innovate government agencies. Understanding launch economics, satellite business models, regulatory requirements, and market dynamics is essential for anyone who wants to work in or build a space company.
coreConcepts: Space tourism and human spaceflight market
